title: Implement a monitoring, evaluation and reporting program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a monitoring, evaluation and reporting program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Implement a monitoring and evaluation strategy

pcs.text: Collect baseline data for program to be monitored and evaluated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect baseline data for program to be monitored and evaluated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect baseline data for program to be monitored and evaluated.

pcs.text: Consult with stakeholders with an interest in the program to be monitored and evaluated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with stakeholders with an interest in the program to be monitored and evaluated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with stakeholders with an interest in the program to be monitored and evaluated.

pcs.text: Brief colleagues, staff and contractors who will be involved in implementing the program on the monitoring and evaluation methods selected and justification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Brief colleagues, staff and contractors who will be involved in implementing the program on the monitoring and evaluation methods selected and justification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Brief colleagues, staff and contractors who will be involved in implementing the program on the monitoring and evaluation methods selected and justification.

pcs.text: Ensure standard procedures and recording templates are available for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure standard procedures and recording templates are available for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure standard procedures and recording templates are available for use.

pcs.text: Ensure program timelines are communicated and monitored
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure program timelines are communicated and monitored?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure program timelines are communicated and monitored.

pcs.text: Implement chosen monitoring and evaluation methods in accordance with defined strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement chosen monitoring and evaluation methods in accordance with defined strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement chosen monitoring and evaluation methods in accordance with defined strategy.

pcs.text: Monitor program expenditure and compare with budget
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor program expenditure and compare with budget?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor program expenditure and compare with budget.
